name: Seerr
description: Beautiful media discovery and request management
compose:
name: slashnode-jellyseerr
services:
  server:
    image: ghcr.io/seerr-team/seerr:v3.3.0
    container_name: jellyseerr
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    init: true
    volumes:
      - server_data-config:/app/config
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:5056:5055
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-config:
    name: slashnode-jellyseerr_server_data-config
